name: @rateloop/nextjs
description: Isolated tokenless RateLoop web app and v1 agent API

scripts.build: node scripts/check-thirdweb-deployment.mjs && node ../../scripts/with-workspace-dist-lock.mjs "yarn build:workspace-deps && rm -rf .next && rm -f node_modules/@rateloop/nextjs ../agents/node_modules/@rateloop/agents ../contracts/node_modules/@rateloop/contracts ../foundry/node_modules/@rateloop/foundry ../keeper/node_modules/@rateloop/keeper ../node-utils/node_modules/@rateloop/node-utils ../ponder/node_modules/@rateloop/ponder ../sdk/node_modules/@rateloop/sdk && next build --turbopack"
scripts.build:workspace-deps: yarn workspace @rateloop/contracts build && yarn workspace @rateloop/sdk build
scripts.check-types: node ../../scripts/with-workspace-dist-lock.mjs "yarn build:workspace-deps && rm -rf .next && next typegen && tsc --noEmit --incremental"
scripts.test: node ../../scripts/with-workspace-dist-lock.mjs "yarn build:workspace-deps && node ../../scripts/run-node-tests.mjs app config lib utils scripts"
